findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: picsart_drive, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_model_params · Private data: picsart_drive, picsart_remove_bg, picsart_change_bg, picsart_enhance, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_model_catalog, picsart_model_params · Public sink: picsart_drive · Destructive: picsart_drive, picsart_remove_bg, picsart_enhance, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_preflight, picsart_credits.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: picsart_drive, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_model_params · Private data: picsart_drive, picsart_remove_bg, picsart_change_bg, picsart_enhance, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_model_catalog, picsart_model_params · Public sink: picsart_drive · Destructive: picsart_drive, picsart_remove_bg, picsart_enhance, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_preflight, picsart_credits

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
